name: Bobby Previte
abstract: Bobby Previte (born July 16, 1951, in Niagara Falls, New York) is a drummer, composer, and bandleader. He  earned a degree in economics from the University at Buffalo, where he also studied percussion.

about_quotes.speaker: Jane Ira Bloom
about_quotes.evidence: Continuing to play with my trio with Bobby Previte on drums... I’ve been doing some quartet recording, that also involved... Bobby Previte on drums.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jane Ira Bloom interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, March 3, 1998
